fields.name: Enable Non-Deductible VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the Non-Deductible VAT feature is enabled.

fields.name: Use For Item Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the non-deductible VAT must be added to the item cost.

fields.name: Use For Fixed Asset Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the non-deductible VAT must be added to the fixed asset cost.

fields.name: Use For Job Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the non-deductible VAT must be added to the project cost.

fields.name: Show Non-Ded. VAT In Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the non-deductible VAT must be shown in document lines pages.

fields.name: Allow VAT Date From
fields.tooltip: Specifies the earliest date on which VAT posting to the company books is allowed.

fields.name: Allow VAT Date To
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last date on which VAT posting to the company books is allowed.
